items.title: Google Adds Stablecoin Support to New AI Payment System, Partners with Coinbase and Ethereum
items.description: Google announced Tuesday that it has added stablecoin support to its new payment framework, designed to allow seamless transactions between AI applications.According to a September 16 Fortune report, Google’s new AI payment protocol supports both stablecoins and conventional payment methods, including credit and debit cards.For stablecoin integration, Fortune reported that ...
